Xsolla is a global commerce company with robust tools and services to help developers solve the inherent challenges of the video game industry. From indie to AAA, companies partner with Xsolla to help them fund, distribute, market, and monetize their games.  Du baust .NET-Anwendungen, die im Enterprise-Umfeld laufen. Dein Schwerpunkt liegt auf dem Backend
